allowed_assumptions: No new states or events need to be added.
constraints: transition must return exactly the same strings for the same inputs.
Use a data structure (dict or list) for the transition table, not if/elif chains.
disallowed_assumptions: The transition table must be a dict lookup only.
prohibited_claims: Model superiority — not authorized by this task.
Wrapper improvement without paired comparison — not measured.
title: Refactor State Transitions
